name: beehiiv
description: beehiiv is a newsletter platform built by the team behind Morning Brew. It's designed for newsletter creators who want powerful growth tools — referral programmes, paid subscriptions, boosts, and detailed analytics.
pros: No transaction fees on paid subs
cons: Less suited for e-commerce or lead nurture
use_cases: You're building a newsletter business and want a referral programme and Boosts network to grow your list without paid ads
You want to monetise your newsletter with paid subscriptions and keep 100% of revenue with no platform cut
You're moving from Substack and need better analytics, segmentation, and growth infrastructure
Your newsletter strategy involves cross-promotions and recommendations to other newsletters in the beehiiv network
